* What Failed: The application failed to establish a connection to the MySQL database during the initialization of Hikari connection pool.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: The test "testSuccessfulTokenGeneration" in the class "JwtUtilNewTokenTest" failed due to a NullPointerException.
* Where: The error occurred in the "newToken" method of the "JwtUtil" class (JwtUtil.java:28) and was triggered by the test method "testSuccessfulTokenGeneration" in the "JwtUtilNewTokenTest" class (JwtUtilNewTokenTest.java:51).
* Why: The NullPointerException was caused by trying to invoke "longValue()" on "jwtExpirationMilliseg" which was null at the time of invocation.
* Investigate: Check the initialization of "jwtExpirationMilliseg". Ensure it is properly initialized before the "newToken" method is called. The error might be due to a missing or incorrect configuration setting, or the "jwtExpirationMilliseg" might not be set properly in the test setup.,
